name: Darryl Colebank
focus: Budgeting and grant management • Financial oversight • Research program operations
bio: Darryl Colebank is a Senior Financial Oversight Analyst at Northern Arizona University and serves as a staff member in the Radiant Center. He has served NAU for nearly 11 years in accounting and financial oversight roles, supporting budgeting, grant management, and responsible stewardship of resources across research programs. He brings extensive experience in financial operations and fiscal planning, along with a strong appreciation for nature and dogs.
